evidence_boundary: Local retrieval evidence from the current embedding-backed eval corpus only; not proof of deployed-path equivalence or a broad benchmark.
selection_note: The same local retrieval report also evaluates `vector_postfilter`. On the current labeled corpus it matches `trace_prefilter_vector`, so this proof pack should be read as two selected examples of keyword brittleness and scope control rather than universal baseline dominance.
